This camera gallery showcases my own personal collection of cameras. Each camera was modelled using photogrammetry with roughly 300 photographs captured per camera to reconstruct highly detailed and accurate 3D models using Polycam. As a result, these models are my exact cameras, aside from the minor imperfections introduced during the scanning process.

The surrounding environment was designed in Blender, with a few models imported from Sketchfab (credited below).

I hope you enjoy exploring my collection!

- Eliana Marshall



Credits

Kane22, Vine
Yannick Deharo, Animated fire
LIGHTSTAR GROUP, 779508 Ingenuo Osgona Sconce
Francesco Coldesina, Old Fireplace
